analysis.consistency: High. The structure follows standard magical item documentation. The mechanics described align well with the item's theme and rarity (Very Rare). The separate table detailing damage resistance by dragon type is clear and comprehensive.
analysis.quality: High. The description is evocative, clearly outlines all mechanical benefits (+1 AC, advantage on specific saves, damage resistance, and the tracking ability), and provides context on how the armor is made.

secondary_effects: Advantage on saving throws against Frightful Presence of dragons.
Advantage on saving throws against breath weapons of dragons.
Resistance to one damage type determined by the dragon scale source (detailed in the embedded table).

special_action.name: Locate Dragon
special_action.effect: Magically discern the distance and direction to the closest dragon of the same type within 30 miles.

analysis.data_integrity: The raw data is complete and well-formatted. The embedded HTML table is extraneous to the core JSON data structure but accurately conveys necessary variant information.
